LinkedAccounts.description: The list of linked accounts in the payer account.

NextToken.description: The pagination token that's used on subsequent calls to get accounts.

BillingGroupArn.description: The Billing Group Arn that the linked account is associated to.

NextToken.description: The pagination token that's used on subsequent calls to get reports.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a billing group.

AWSCost.description: The actual Amazon Web Services charges for the billing group.

ProformaCost.description: The hypothetical Amazon Web Services charges based on the associated pricing plan of a billing group.

NextToken.description: The pagination token that's used on subsequent calls to get billing groups.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) that can be used to uniquely identify the billing group.

PrimaryAccountId.description: The account ID that serves as the main account in a billing group.

ComputationPreference.description: The preferences and settings that will be used to compute the Amazon Web Services charges for a billing group.

PricingPlanArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the pricing plan that's used to compute the Amazon Web Services charges for a billing group.

Size.description: The number of accounts in the particular billing group.

CreationTime.description: The time when the billing group was created.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time when the billing group was modified.

Status.description: The billing group status. Only one of the valid values can be used.

StatusReason.description: The reason why the billing group is in its current status.

AccountGrouping.description: Specifies if the billing group has automatic account association (AutoAssociate) enabled.

AutoAssociate.description: Specifies if this billing group will automatically associate newly added Amazon Web Services accounts that join your consolidated billing family.

ResponsibilityTransferArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the transfer relationship for the billing group.

NextToken.description: The pagination token that's used on subsequent calls to get custom line items (FFLIs).

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) for custom line items.

ChargeDetails.description: A ListCustomLineItemChargeDetails that describes the charge details of a custom line item.

Flat.description: A ListCustomLineItemFlatChargeDetails that describes the charge details of a flat custom line item.

ChargeValue.description: The custom line item's fixed charge value in USD.

Percentage.description: A ListCustomLineItemPercentageChargeDetails that describes the charge details of a percentage custom line item.

PercentageValue.description: The custom line item's percentage value. This will be multiplied against the combined value of its associated resources to determine its charge value.

Type.description: The type of the custom line item that indicates whether the charge is a fee or credit.

LineItemFilters.description: A representation of the line item filter.

CurrencyCode.description: The custom line item's charge value currency. Only one of the valid values can be used.

Description.description: The custom line item's description. This is shown on the Bills page in association with the charge value.

ProductCode.description: The product code that's associated with the custom line item.

BillingGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that references the billing group where the custom line item applies to.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time when the custom line item was modified.

AssociationSize.description: The number of resources that are associated to the custom line item.

AccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account in which this custom line item will be applied to.

ComputationRule.description: The computation rule that determines how the custom line item charges are computed and reflected in the bill.

PresentationDetails.description: Configuration details specifying how the custom line item charges are presented, including which service the charges are shown under.

Service.description: The service under which the custom line item charges will be presented. Must be a string between 1 and 128 characters matching the pattern "^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$".

BillingPeriod.description: The billing period for which the described pricing plans are applicable.

NextToken.description: The pagination token that's used on subsequent calls to get pricing plans.

Arn.description: The pricing plan Amazon Resource Names (ARN). This can be used to uniquely identify a pricing plan.

Size.description: The pricing rules count that's currently associated with this pricing plan list element.

CreationTime.description: The time when the pricing plan was created.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time when the pricing plan was modified.

BillingPeriod.description: The billing period for which the described pricing rules are applicable.

PricingRules.description: A list containing the described pricing rules.

NextToken.description: The pagination token that's used on subsequent calls to get pricing rules.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) used to uniquely identify a pricing rule.

Scope.description: The scope of pricing rule that indicates if it is globally applicable, or if it is service-specific.

ModifierPercentage.description: A percentage modifier applied on the public pricing rates.

Service.description: If the Scope attribute is SERVICE, this attribute indicates which service the PricingRule is applicable for.

AssociatedPricingPlanCount.description: The pricing plans count that this pricing rule is associated with.

CreationTime.description: The time when the pricing rule was created.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time when the pricing rule was modified.

BillingEntity.description: The seller of services provided by Amazon Web Services, their affiliates, or third-party providers selling services via Amazon Web Services Marketplace.

Tiering.description: The set of tiering configurations for the pricing rule.

FreeTier.description: The possible Amazon Web Services Free Tier configurations.

Activated.description: Activate or deactivate Amazon Web Services Free Tier application.

UsageType.description:
Usage type is the unit that each service uses to measure the usage of a specific type of resource.

If the Scope attribute is set to SKU, this attribute indicates which usage type the PricingRule is modifying. For example, USW2-BoxUsage:m2.2xlarge describes an M2 High Memory Double Extra Large instance in the US West (Oregon) Region.

Operation.description:
Operation is the specific Amazon Web Services action covered by this line item. This describes the specific usage of the line item.

If the Scope attribute is set to SKU, this attribute indicates which operation the PricingRule is modifying. For example, a value of RunInstances:0202 indicates the operation of running an Amazon EC2 instance.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the billing group that associates the array of account IDs.
The PricingPlanArn that the PricingRuleArns are associated with.

SuccessfullyAssociatedResources.description: A list of AssociateResourceResponseElement for each resource that's been associated to a percentage custom line item successfully.

FailedAssociatedResources.description: A list of AssociateResourceResponseElement for each resource that failed association to a percentage custom line item.

Arn.description: The resource ARN that was associated to the custom line item.

Error.description: An AssociateResourceError that will populate if the resource association fails.

Message.description: The reason why the resource association failed.

Reason.description: A static error code that's used to classify the type of failure.

SuccessfullyDisassociatedResources.description: A list of DisassociateResourceResponseElement for each resource that's been disassociated from a percentage custom line item successfully.

FailedDisassociatedResources.description: A list of DisassociateResourceResponseElement for each resource that failed disassociation from a percentage custom line item.

Arn.description: The resource ARN that was disassociated from the custom line item.

Error.description: An AssociateResourceError that's shown if the resource disassociation fails.

Message.description: The reason why the resource association failed.

Reason.description: A static error code that's used to classify the type of failure.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created billing group.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created custom line item.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created pricing plan.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created pricing rule.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the deleted billing group.
The ARN of the deleted custom line item.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the deleted pricing plan.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the deleted pricing rule.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the billing group that the array of account IDs is disassociated from.
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the pricing plan that the pricing rules successfully disassociated from.

NextToken.description: The pagination token used on subsequent calls to get reports.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) that uniquely identifies the billing group.

AWSCost.description: The actual Amazon Web Services charges for the billing group.

ProformaCost.description: The hypothetical Amazon Web Services charges based on the associated pricing plan of a billing group.

MarginPercentage.description: The percentage of the billing group margin.

Attributes.description: The list of key-value pairs that represent the attributes by which the BillingGroupCostReportResults are grouped. For example, if you want the Amazon S3 service-level breakdown of a billing group for November 2023, the attributes list will contain a key-value pair of "PRODUCT_NAME" and "S3" and a key-value pair of "BILLING_PERIOD" and "Nov 2023".

NextToken.description: The pagination token that's used on subsequent calls to retrieve custom line item versions.

Name.description: The name of the custom line item.

ChargeDetails.description: A representation of the charge details of a custom line item.

Flat.description: A ListCustomLineItemFlatChargeDetails that describes the charge details of a flat custom line item.

ChargeValue.description: The custom line item's fixed charge value in USD.

Percentage.description: A ListCustomLineItemPercentageChargeDetails that describes the charge details of a percentage custom line item.

PercentageValue.description: The custom line item's percentage value. This will be multiplied against the combined value of its associated resources to determine its charge value.

Type.description: The type of the custom line item that indicates whether the charge is a fee or credit.

LineItemFilters.description: A representation of the line item filter.

CurrencyCode.description: The charge value currency of the custom line item.

Description.description: The description of the custom line item.

ProductCode.description: The product code that’s associated with the custom line item.

BillingGroupArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the billing group that the custom line item applies to.

CreationTime.description: The time when the custom line item version was created.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time that the custom line item version was modified.

AssociationSize.description: The number of resources that are associated with the custom line item.

StartBillingPeriod.description: The start billing period of the custom line item version.

EndBillingPeriod.description: The end billing period of the custom line item version.

Arn.description: A list of custom line item Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) to retrieve information.

AccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account in which this custom line item will be applied to.

ComputationRule.description: The computation rule for a specific version of a custom line item, determining how charges are computed and reflected in the bill.

PresentationDetails.description: Presentation configuration for a specific version of a custom line item, specifying how charges are displayed in the bill.

Service.description: The service under which the custom line item charges will be presented. Must be a string between 1 and 128 characters matching the pattern "^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$".

BillingPeriod.description: The pricing plan billing period for which associations will be listed.

PricingRuleArn.description: The pricing rule Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for which associations will be listed.

PricingPlanArns.description: The list containing pricing plans that are associated with the requested pricing rule.

NextToken.description: The pagination token to be used on subsequent calls.

BillingPeriod.description: The billing period for which the pricing rule associations are listed.

PricingPlanArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the pricing plan for which associations are listed.

PricingRuleArns.description: A list containing pricing rules that are associated with the requested pricing plan.

NextToken.description: The pagination token to be used on subsequent calls.

Arn.description: The custom line item ARN for which the resource associations are listed.

AssociatedResources.description: A list of ListResourcesAssociatedToCustomLineItemResponseElement for each resource association retrieved.

NextToken.description: The pagination token to be used in subsequent requests to retrieve additional results.

Arn.description: The ARN of the associated resource.

Relationship.description: The type of relationship between the custom line item and the associated resource.

EndBillingPeriod.description: The end billing period of the associated resource.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the billing group that was updated.

Name.description: The name of the billing group. The names must be unique to each billing group.

Description.description: A description of the billing group.

PrimaryAccountId.description: The account ID that serves as the main account in a billing group.

PricingPlanArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the pricing plan to compute Amazon Web Services charges for the billing group.

Size.description: The number of accounts in the particular billing group.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time when the billing group was modified.

Status.description: The status of the billing group. Only one of the valid values can be used.

StatusReason.description: The reason why the billing group is in its current status.

AccountGrouping.description: Specifies if the billing group has automatic account association (AutoAssociate) enabled.

AutoAssociate.description: Specifies if this billing group will automatically associate newly added Amazon Web Services accounts that join your consolidated billing family.

ResponsibilityTransferArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that identifies the transfer relationship. Note: Modifications to the ResponsibilityTransferArn are not permitted for existing billing groups.

Arn.description: The ARN of the successfully updated custom line item.

BillingGroupArn.description: The ARN of the billing group that the custom line item is applied to.

Name.description: The name of the successfully updated custom line item.

Description.description: The description of the successfully updated custom line item.

ChargeDetails.description: A ListCustomLineItemChargeDetails containing the charge details of the successfully updated custom line item.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time when the custom line item was modified.

AssociationSize.description: The number of resources that are associated to the custom line item.

Flat.description: A ListCustomLineItemFlatChargeDetails that describes the charge details of a flat custom line item.

ChargeValue.description: The custom line item's fixed charge value in USD.

Percentage.description: A ListCustomLineItemPercentageChargeDetails that describes the charge details of a percentage custom line item.

PercentageValue.description: The custom line item's percentage value. This will be multiplied against the combined value of its associated resources to determine its charge value.

Type.description: The type of the custom line item that indicates whether the charge is a fee or credit.

LineItemFilters.description: A representation of the line item filter.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the updated pricing plan.

Name.description: The name of the pricing plan. The name must be unique to each pricing plan.

Description.description: The new description for the pricing rule.

Size.description: The pricing rules count that's currently associated with this pricing plan list.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time when the pricing plan was modified.

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the successfully updated pricing rule.

Name.description: The new name of the pricing rule. The name must be unique to each pricing rule.

Description.description: The new description for the pricing rule.

Scope.description: The scope of pricing rule that indicates if it's globally applicable, or it's service-specific.

ModifierPercentage.description: The new modifier to show pricing plan rates as a percentage.

Service.description: If the Scope attribute is set to SERVICE, the attribute indicates which service the PricingRule is applicable for.

AssociatedPricingPlanCount.description: The pricing plans count that this pricing rule is associated with.

LastModifiedTime.description: The most recent time the pricing rule was modified.

BillingEntity.description: The seller of services provided by Amazon Web Services, their affiliates, or third-party providers selling services via Amazon Web Services Marketplace.

Tiering.description: The set of tiering configurations for the pricing rule.

UsageType.description:
Usage type is the unit that each service uses to measure the usage of a specific type of resource.

If the Scope attribute is set to SKU, this attribute indicates which usage type the PricingRule is modifying. For example, USW2-BoxUsage:m2.2xlarge describes an M2 High Memory Double Extra Large instance in the US West (Oregon) Region.

Operation.description:
Operation refers to the specific Amazon Web Services covered by this line item. This describes the specific usage of the line item.

If the Scope attribute is set to SKU, this attribute indicates which operation the PricingRule is modifying. For example, a value of RunInstances:0202 indicates the operation of running an Amazon EC2 instance.

FreeTier.description: The possible Amazon Web Services Free Tier configurations.

Activated.description: Activate or deactivate application of Amazon Web Services Free Tier.
